items.company: Shenzhen Xiaohetun Overseas Technology Co., Ltd.
items.description:
- Developed an image processing tool (compression, conversion, cropping) using Next.js, Sharp, and React-Advanced-Cropper, helping users optimize website assets more efficiently.

- Built an AI-powered WordPress plugin (using PHP, JavaScript, and React) capable of generating complete websites from text prompts, reducing website build time from several hours to under 10 minutes in internal testing.

- Applied prompt engineering to optimize system instructions, significantly improving AI output quality and token efficiency, thereby enhancing the website generator's performance and cost-effectiveness.

- Created a visual editor for the plugin, enabling users to make fine adjustments to AI-generated layouts via manual tweaks or further AI instructions.

- Designed the plugin's UI/UX using Tailwind CSS, SCSS, and ANT Design, delivering a clean and intuitive interface.

- Contributed to the open-source Chrome extension Nanobrowser: built automated domain purchase workflows for Namesilo and Hostinger, reducing task execution steps by ~40% and lowering LLM token usage per workflow run.

- Collaborated closely with backend developers to design and integrate APIs and data structures, ensuring smooth functionality between the frontend and backend systems.

- I provide production support for SAP ECC 6.0 FI–CO across large manufacturing and trading clients, ensuring 99%+ system availability during critical financial periods. I led the design, development, and UAT of a custom Z-program to automate recurring journal entries and intercompany reconciliations, saving over 20 hours per month-end close.

- I manage month-end and year-end closing activities—including balance carry-forward, FX revaluation, depreciation runs, and cost settlements—with 100% accuracy. I also enhance FI–MM/SD integration by improving automatic account determination, validation/substitution logic, and custom reporting, increasing process efficiency by 25%.

- Additionally, I support internal and external audits with accurate financial data and documentation, and resolve complex FI/CO issues using ABAP runtime analysis and SQL trace, consistently meeting SLA requirements.

expertises.title: Full-stack Engineer
expertises.description: Experienced in full-stack development using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. Skilled in building scalable front-end interfaces, handling API integrations, and working with databases like MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Firebase, and Neon.

expertises.title: Design Conversion
expertises.description: Capable of converting Figma designs into clean, responsive, and high-quality web interfaces using TailwindCSS, Material UI, and SCSS. Ensures consistent visuals across mobile, tablet, and desktop.

expertises.title: Version Control
expertises.description: Proficient with Git and GitHub, including branching, pull requests, code reviews, and collaborative workflows. Committed to maintaining clean and trackable commit history.

expertises.title: Problem Solving
expertises.description: Strong analytical and logical thinking with experience solving complex technical problems using JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python. Focused on efficient, reliable, and scalable solutions.

expertises.title: Task & Time Management
expertises.description: Able to work independently or in teams with clear prioritization, consistent delivery, and effective communication. Comfortable working in agile and fast-paced environments.

expertises.title: Web Scraping & Automation
expertises.description: Hands-on experience with Selenium and Scrapy for large-scale web scraping, data extraction, and automation. Familiar with handling dynamic content, structuring data, and integrating results into APIs or databases.

projects.title: The Time Palace
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with SSR catalog, dynamic filters, and a full admin dashboard with analytics and role-based access.

projects.title: The Pelataran Website
projects.description: Cabin booking system with full reservation flow, availability checking, authentication, and responsive UI.

projects.title: The Pelataran Admin Dashboard
projects.description: SPA admin dashboard with real-time data, editable tables, filtering, sorting, and pagination powered by React Query.

projects.title: Jobstreet Scraper
projects.description: Automated Jobstreet scraper with anti-ban behavior, GUI controls, multithreaded worker, and CSV export.
